metadata.title: Find orphaned files and broken links
metadata.description: Find files that are not linked anywhere and would otherwise be lost in your vault. In other words: files with no backlinks.

regex.source: text: "Settings for finding files without tags"
regex.target: text: "查找无标签文件的设置"

regex.source: name: "Delete orphaned files with certain extension. See README"
regex.target: name: "删除特定扩展名的孤立文件。参见 README"
name: "为损坏的链接创建文件"

regex.source: .setName("Filetypes to delete per command. See README.")
regex.target: .setName("按命令删除的文件类型。参见 README。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add each directory path in a new line")
.setDesc("Add each file path in a new line (with file extension!)")
regex.target: .setDesc("每行添加一个文件路径（含扩展名！）")
